author: John_Sarge
name: BotRelay
short: Relays messages between channels using the bot account.
description: A cog that relays messages, including bots and webhooks, using the bot's own account.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or metadata about users.
install_msg: Thanks for installing BotRelay! Use `[p]help botrelay` to see available commands.
